title: sorghum durra var. mediocre
side_effects: Sorghum durra var. mediocre can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high content of phytic acid. Consuming excessive amounts of sorghum durra var. mediocre can also lead to an imbalance of nutrients, causing fatigue, weakness, and muscle wasting. Furthermore, individuals with gluten intolerance or sensitivity may experience adverse reactions, such as bloating and abdominal pain, if they consume sorghum durra var. mediocre in large quantities. In severe cases, improper use of sorghum durra var. mediocre can cause electrolyte imbalances and dehydration, particularly if not enough fluids are consumed to compensate for the loss of essential nutrients.
